title: Engineering the future of Kubernetes for AI at scale
summary: Google Cloud discusses Kubernetes evolution for AI-scale workloads, emphasizing hardware-aware platforms, infrastructure elasticity, agentic workflow security, and resource optimization. Google frames itself as the leading Kubernetes contributor steering industry direction for 11 consecutive years.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech outlines how Kubernetes is evolving to handle AI-scale workloads, covering hardware-aware platforms, infrastructure elasticity, security for agentic workflows, and resource optimization. The discussion spans inference, batch processing, hardware reuse, and I/O optimization as pressure points for running AI agents at scale. Google positions itself as the leading Kubernetes contributor for 11 consecutive years and frames its role as steering industry direction.
